name: @fluida/core
description: Framework-agnostic engine that computes responsive layout decisions from a viewport, and container-based layout from a real measured element — no runtime dependencies, no UI framework required.

scripts.prepack:
node -e "if (!/pnpm/.test(process.env.npm_config_user_agent || '')) { console.error('
❌ This package must be packed/published with pnpm (pnpm pack / pnpm publish), not plain npm.
   @fluida/core has no workspace: dependencies itself, but this guard is kept identical across both packages so the rule is never accidentally different in one of them.
'); process.exit(1); }"
